text: {"verdicts": [{"commitment_id": 1, "new_status": "met", "reason": "Daniel Cho confirmed 'closing the Cirrus Analytics acquisition on schedule in the final week of fiscal Q3, exactly as we committed.'"},{"commitment_id": 2, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"},{"commitment_id": 3, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas stated Q3 margin was 19.2%, putting Nimbus 'on track to deliver full-year fiscal 2026 non-GAAP operating margin at approximately 19 percent'; FY2026 not yet closed."},{"commitment_id": 4, "new_status": "missed", "reason": "Helena Vargas explicitly stated 'we now expect GAAP operating income to be slightly negative for fiscal 2026' and 'we did not achieve that commitment.'"},{"commitment_id": 5, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Daniel Cho reaffirmed 'native Cirrus query capabilities inside the Stratus console by the end of fiscal Q4 2026'; Q4 has not yet closed."},{"commitment_id": 6, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"},{"commitment_id": 7, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Daniel Cho stated Stratus Copilot GA is pushed to fiscal Q2 2027; Q4 2026 deadline has not yet closed, so commitment remains open pending Q4 results."},{"commitment_id": 8, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas said EMEA is 'increasingly confident that mid-single-digit growth is achievable' in Q4; Q4 has not yet closed."},{"commitment_id": 9, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas reaffirmed 'we continue to expect to fully exhaust the 500 million dollar authorisation by the end of fiscal 2026'; FY2026 not yet closed."},{"commitment_id": 10, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"}]}
